title: Excellence in Agronomy 2030 - Use Case term sheets - May 2021
abstract: The Excellence in Agronomy 2030 (EiA 2030) Initiative aims at developing and delivering agronomy at scale solutions based on demand from scaling partners. Such demand is then formulated and operationalized around Use Cases.
